overview.minides: The iconic Tata Sierra reborn as a pure electric SUV — with a triple-screen dashboard, 665km MIDC range, V2L/V2V charging, Level 2 ADAS with 22 features, Dolby Atmos JBL audio, and India's first Quad Wheel Drive EV in this segment.
overview.description: Launched on June 30, 2026, the Tata Sierra EV is the electric reincarnation of India's most iconic SUV. Built on Tata's Gen 3 EV architecture and sharing its battery-motor platform with the Harrier EV, it is offered with two battery packs — 63 kWh (238 PS / 315 Nm, RWD only) and 75 kWh — and three drivetrain configurations including Tata's Quad Wheel Drive (QWD) dual-motor AWD system. The 75 kWh QWD produces 349 PS and 504 Nm with a claimed 0-100 km/h time of 5.8 seconds in Boost Mode, and a segment-leading 665 km MIDC-claimed range. The cabin retains the Sierra's signature wraparound rear glass and features a triple-screen dashboard with a 12.3-inch main touchscreen, 12.3-inch passenger display, and 10.25-inch digital cluster. Top variants add a 12-speaker JBL Dolby Atmos system, panoramic sunroof, powered and ventilated front seats, HUD, 540-degree surround-view camera with Transparent Mode, Level 2 ADAS with 22 features, V2L and V2V charging, and 6 terrain modes on QWD. A lifetime high-voltage battery warranty is offered for eligible private owners.

dimensions.bootSpace: 622 Litres (1257 L with Rear Seats Folded)
